questions.question: What sea could you catch rays on if you found yourself in Baku, Azerbaijan?
Who joked about landing the role as the young Obi-Wan: "I really want to play Princess Leia. Stick some big pastries on my head"?
What conflict was known as "Truman's folly"?
What telephonic technology got its name from the Latin words meaning "make alike"?
What innovative foil-wrapped candy was originally hyped: "For that stormy breath"?
What cartoon series, based on Nintendo's Pocket Monsters game, sent flocks of Japanese kids to the hospital with nausea or seizures?
